instructions:
## AutoDS Products API — Agent Reference

### Key enums

**product_status** (always use integer values):
1=draft, 2=active, 3=ended, 4=untracked, 5=scheduled, 6=pre_draft

**sell sites** (site_id — the selling channel):
1=ebay, 2=amazon, 3=shopify, 4=facebook, 5=wix, 6=woocommerce, 7=etsy, 8=tiktok

**buy sites** (supplier — the source site):
1=amazon, 2=aliexpress, 3=banggood, 4=walmart, 5=homedepot, 6=wayfair,
7=costco, 8=overstock, 9=costway, 10=chinabrands, 11=etsy, 12=lowes,
13=ebay, 14=target, 15=cjdropshipping, 16=samsclub, 17=vidaxl,
18=gearbest, 19=miniinthebox, 20=lightinthebox, 21=alibaba,
22=pureformulas, 23=redbubble, 24=wish, 25=kmart, 26=dhgate,
27=autods_marketplace, 28=shein, 29=macys, 30=kohls, 31=catch,
32=shopify, 33=autods_sourcing, 34=temu, 35=cdiscount,
36=print_on_demand, 37=tiktok, 38=alibaba_1688, 39=kogan

**region**: 1=us, 2=uk, 3=de, 4=fr, 5=it, 6=cn, 7=all_regions,
8=th, 9=es, 10=au, 11=ca, 12=pl, 13=ru, 14=be, 15=cz,
16=vn, 17=my, 18=sg, 19=ph, 20=id, 21=br, 22=ie

**inventory_status**: 1=in_stock, 2=out_of_stock, 3=on_hold

**error_type**: 0=vero_error, 1=internal_error, 2=untracked_error,
3=monitor_error, 4=upload_error, 5=supplier_changes_error,
6=draft_error_reason, 7=file_exchange, 8=facebook_helper,
9=selling_channel_changes

**bulk_action_type** (integer values):
1=create_draft, 2=import_to_marketplace, 3=import_untracked,
4=products_update, 5=products_delete, 6=drafts_delete,
7=orders_update, 8=drafts_update, 9=products_relist,
10=conversations_update

**bulk_status**: 1=created, 2=in_progress, 3=finished, 4=canceled, 99=error

### Filter system

list_products body requires: product_status (integer, e.g. 2 for active), optional filters array.
Each filter: {name, value, op, value_type}.

Filter operators: =, ne, <, <=, >, >=, in, not_in, like, not_like,
has, any, starts_with, ends_with, exists, exact_date, between

Filter value types: integer, float, bool, string, list, list_int, datetime, object_id

**Filter by product id**: filter by `id` with `value_type: object_id` (each id is a 24-character hex string). Single id: {"name": "id", "op": "=", "value": "<product id>", "value_type": "object_id"}. Multiple ids: {"name": "id", "op": "in", "value_list": ["<product id>", ...], "value_type": "list"}. Multi-value ops (in/not_in) take their values in `value_list` (not `value`); value_type `list`/`list_int` REQUIRE `value_list`.

**IMPORTANT**: All enum fields use integer values — both top-level fields
(product_status, buy_site_id, region) and filter values
(status, variations.inventory_status, variations.active_buy_item.site_id).

### Common patterns
- store_ids is always a path parameter (comma-separated string of store IDs)
- POST list/search endpoints are read-only (safe), body contains filter/pagination
- limit/offset pagination: default limit=100, offset=0
- product_id in URLs is the product's 24-character hex id string

### IMPORTANT: PUT = full replacement
update_product (PUT) requires the ENTIRE product object, not just changed fields.
Workflow: GET the product first → modify needed fields → PUT the full object back.
Sending only changed fields will wipe everything else. Use update_product_note (PATCH)
for note-only changes.

operations.summary: Bulk-upload products to one or more stores from supplier products, a file, or finder categories.
operations.notes: Bulk-upload products to one or more stores. Async: starts an asynchronous bulk job and returns immediately with {"status": "Product uploading started", "bulk_action": {...}}; poll progress by passing bulk_action.id to get_bulk_action_items (autods-bulk-actions manifest). Provide at least ONE product source in the body: new_products, file_url, or finder_categories. The asin in new_products is the supplier's product id, usually embedded in the product URL (e.g. Amazon B0D8HR6M4B from .../dp/B0D8HR6M4B/...) — pass the bare id or the full product URL, not a search/category landing page. If status=5 (scheduled), upload_settings.scheduled_datetime is required and must be a future, timezone-aware time. See the enum tables in the server instructions for region/status/buy_site_id values.

parameters.name: store_ids
parameters.description: AutoDS store IDs if more than one should be comma separated

body_schema.description: Provide at least one product source: new_products, file_url, or finder_categories.

region.description: Region enum value, e.g. 1=us, 2=uk, 3=de (see region table in server instructions).

buy_site_id.description: Supplier site enum value, e.g. 1=amazon, 2=aliexpress, 4=walmart (see buy sites table in server instructions).

asin.description: Supplier product id or full product URL (required).

file_url.description: URL of a file/CSV of products to import.

scheduled_datetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime; required when status=5 (scheduled), must be future & timezone-aware.

parameters.name: store_ids
parameters.description: AutoDS store IDs if more than one should be comma separated

operations.notes: Imports draft products to the marketplace (the selling channel — eBay, Shopify, etc.) in bulk. Async: starts an asynchronous import job and returns immediately with {"status": ..., "bulk_action": {...}}; poll bulk_action.id via get_bulk_action_items (autods-bulk-actions manifest). product_status selects which products to act on. OMIT `filters` to import ALL products of that status (rarely intended); to target specific products filter by id ({"name": "id", "op": "in", "value_type": "list", "value_list": [...]}, or op "=" with value_type "object_id" for one). See the enum tables in the server instructions.

product_status.description: Selects which products to act on: 1=draft, 2=active, 3=ended, 4=untracked, 5=scheduled, 6=pre_draft.

filters.description: Selects which products to import. Omit to import ALL products of that status.

name.description: Filterable field name. Filter by `id` with value_type `object_id` (24-character hex string).

value.description: Single-value operand. Enum-valued fields take their INTEGER value, not the name.

value_list.description: Multi-value operand; REQUIRED for in/not_in and for value_type list/list_int.

parameters.name: store_ids
parameters.description: AutoDS store IDs if more than one should be comma separated

operations.notes: Read-only POST. Queries products by filter and returns {results: [...]}. Filterable fields include title, tags, status, variations.price, variations.active_buy_item.price/site_id/region, created_date, upload_date, etc. Enum-valued filter values (status, region, variations.inventory_status, variations.active_buy_item.site_id) take their INTEGER value, not the name. Filter by `id` with value_type `object_id` (each id is a 24-character hex string); multi-value ops (in/not_in) and value_type list/list_int put their values in `value_list`. See the enum tables in the server instructions for the full mappings. Product objects are LARGE (variations, images, description, item_specifics): for listing/summary use cases ALWAYS pass `projection` (e.g. ["title","variations.price","amount_of_variations","total_sold_count","item_id_on_site","upload_date"]) and/or a small `limit` — a full-object page of 100 can exceed ~80 KB and overflow response token limits.

product_status.description: Required INTEGER enum value (NOT the name — sending a string like "active" returns HTTP 422): 1=draft, 2=active, 3=ended, 4=untracked, 5=scheduled, 6=pre_draft.

name.description: Filterable field name. Filter by `id` with value_type `object_id` (24-character hex string).

value.description: Single-value operand. Enum-valued fields take their INTEGER value, not the name.

value_list.description: Multi-value operand; REQUIRED for in/not_in and for value_type list/list_int.
